results.rendered_html: saṃ-˚daṃśaka m. (or f(ikā). ) a pair of tongs or pincers or nippers, small shears or tongs, a vice,  Daś. ;  Amar.

results.rendered_html:
saṃdaṃśaka (von saṃdaṃśa)
1〉 wohl m. Zange  DAŚAK. 71,1 . pādāgrasaṃdaṃśakenākṛṣyāmbaram  Spr. (II) 4014 .
— 2〉 f. saṃdaṃśikā dass.; = sucuṭī und lohayantraviśeṣa  MED. k. 219 .
— Vgl. raktasaṃdaṃśikā.
